title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited family as a Financial Analyst in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
